summary: Phase 4 Steps 6-8 Edge Case Hardening testing complete. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed missing portfolio data in sales performance team endpoint.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Test companies, contacts, and individuals created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Steps 6-8 complete. All edge case hardening features verified: (1) Duplicate company prevention by domain and normalized name works, (2) Duplicate individual prevention by email works, (3) Pre-creation check-duplicate endpoint returns matches for email/domain/company_name, (4) Name normalization strips all suffixes (ltd, limited, inc, corp, etc.) and is case-insensitive, (5) Free email domains (gmail, yahoo, etc.) are excluded from corporate domain matching, (6) Customer order response correctly strips ownership fields, (7) Sales performance team endpoint now includes portfolio data (owned_companies, owned_individuals), (8) All regression tests pass (CRM lead routing, admin reassignment, vendor performance, governance settings).

1_duplicate_company_by_domain.details: Creating company with existing domain returns {duplicate: true, existing: {...}}

2_duplicate_company_by_normalized_name.details: 'Acme Tanzania Ltd' vs 'Acme Tanzania Limited' correctly detected as duplicate via normalized_name matching

3_name_normalization_suffixes.details: All suffixes stripped: ltd, limited, inc, incorporated, corp, corporation, llc, plc, co, company, group, gmbh, pty, pvt, sa, srl, ag

4_case_insensitive_matching.details: 'ACME TANZANIA LIMITED', 'acme tanzania', 'Acme Tanzania Ltd' all match correctly

5_duplicate_individual_by_email.details: Creating individual with existing email returns {duplicate: true, existing: {...}}

6_duplicate_individual_by_phone.details: Phone duplicate check also implemented and working

7_check_duplicate_email.details: Returns matches for email (contacts and individuals)

8_check_duplicate_domain.details: Extracts domain from email and returns company matches

9_check_duplicate_company_name.details: Returns company matches by normalized name

10_free_email_exclusion_gmail.details: gmail.com domain NOT used for corporate domain matching

11_free_email_exclusion_yahoo.details: yahoo.com domain NOT used for corporate domain matching

12_free_email_domains_list.details: All 14 free email domains excluded: gmail, yahoo, hotmail, outlook, live, aol, icloud, mail, protonmail, zoho, yandex, gmx, fastmail, tutanota

13_customer_orders_strips_ownership.details: Response correctly strips: assigned_sales_owner_id, ownership_company_id, ownership_individual_id, ownership_resolution, sales_owner_id, assigned_sales_id

15_sales_performance_portfolio_team.details: Now includes portfolio.owned_companies and portfolio.owned_individuals for each team member (FIXED during testing)

16_sales_performance_portfolio_individua.details: Includes portfolio data in individual performance response

17_regression_crm_lead_routing.details: CRM lead creation with company routing still works correctly

18_regression_admin_reassignment.details: Admin reassignment with audit log still works correctly

20_regression_governance_settings.details: Performance governance settings endpoint still works

21_new_entity_auto_assign.details: Ownership routing for new entity (no matches) auto-assigns via scoring engine

22_contact_auto_creation.details: Contact under existing company auto-creates contact record

sales_performance_portfolio.issue: Team endpoint (/api/admin/sales-performance/team) was not including portfolio data
sales_performance_portfolio.fix: Added portfolio field to team member response: portfolio: perf.get('portfolio', {'owned_companies': 0, 'owned_individuals': 0})
